hero_subheadline: Discover MyGov. Personal Government Zone is a new application that makes digital services accessible to residents

benefits.title: Wide Access
benefits.description: Access to a wide range of government services in one place

benefits.title: Convenient Easy
benefits.description: Convenient and easy-to-use interface for quick actions

faq_items.question: How to download and install the app
faq_items.answer: The app is designed for a reliable, user-friendly experience from first install.

faq_items.question: What services are available through the app
faq_items.answer: The app is designed for a reliable, user-friendly experience from first install.

faq_items.question: How to ensure the security of personal information
faq_items.answer: Your account and usage settings are managed inside the app. Review permissions and privacy settings during onboarding for best control.
